basic_details.job_title: MSWWDA East Garo Hills Programme Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Meghalaya State Watershed & Wasteland Development Agency
basic_details.short_information: Meghalaya State Watershed & Wasteland Development Agency (MSWWDA East Garo Hills) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Programme Associate (Administration & Data Management) Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate or Post Graduate in any disciplines
qualification.details: Graduate or Post Graduate in any disciplines

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MSWWDA East Garo Hills Programme Associate (Administration & Data Management) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: eastgarohills.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.meghalaya_state_watershed_wasteland_deve: Graduate or Post Graduate in any disciplines

content_sections.heading: MSWWDA East Garo Hills Programme Associate (Administration & Data Management) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the MSWWDA East Garo Hills Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download MSWWDA East Garo Hills Programme Associate (Administration & Data Management) Job 2026 Notification PDF

Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Graduate or Post Graduate in any disciplines

content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years

content_sections.heading: MSWWDA East Garo Hills Programme Associate (Administration & Data Management) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for MSWWDA East Garo Hills Programme Associate (Administration & Data Management) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: eastgarohills.gov.in/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: MSWWDA East Garo Hills Programme Associate (Administration & Data Management) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MSWWDA East Garo Hills Programme Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form is 15th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Programme Associate post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a Graduate or Post Graduate degree in any discipline to be eligible for the Programme Associate (Administration & Data Management) position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 37 years for all categories of candidates applying for this post.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the MSWWDA East Garo Hills recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Programme Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated monthly salary of Rs. 22,100/- per month for the contractual period.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Programme Associate role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Programme Associate (Administration & Data Management) post will be based on a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Meghalaya State Watershed & Wasteland Development Agency (MSWWDA East Garo Hills).

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Programme Associate (Administration & Data Management) in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of MSWWDA East Garo Hills. Links are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
